_comment: CONFIGURATION REQUIRED before activating: set ALERT_DISPATCH_SECRET as an environment variable in n8n. The value must match ALERT_DISPATCH_SECRET in the FastAPI backend .env. Update the 'url' field to your production backend URL (e.g. https://api.safeearth.tech/api/v1/alerts/monthly-dispatch). See ADMIN_API.md for full setup instructions.
name: SafeEarth — Monthly Alert Digest

nodes.name: 1st of Month 08:00 UTC
nodes.notes: Fires on the 1st of each month at 08:00 UTC. Cron: 0 8 1 * *

nodes.name: POST /alerts/monthly-dispatch
nodes.notes: Sends one digest email per premium user who had ≥1 alert in the previous calendar month. Body uses $now.minus(1,'month') to target the month before the trigger date. Response: {dispatched: N, skipped: M, period: 'YYYY-MM', queued_in_background: true}. n8n triggers only — FastAPI does all fan-out and email sending.
